svg.title: GTT Bot architecture diagram
svg.desc: Four-service Docker Compose stack: Obsidian vault feeds an indexer that embeds via Ollama and stores in Qdrant. The Discord bot retrieves from Qdrant, calls Claude for answers, and posts back to Discord.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the indexer watch the Obsidian vault?')
sendPrompt('How does the bot handle Discord messages?')
sendPrompt('How does the indexer chunk and embed vault files?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the bot on_message handler')
sendPrompt('What embedding model does the bot use?')
sendPrompt('How does the bot use Qdrant for retrieval?')
sendPrompt('How does the bot call the Anthropic API?')
sendPrompt('How does the GTT Bot automod work?')
sendPrompt('What slash commands does the GTT Bot have?')
